sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages Barclays PLC Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation - BCS
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against Barclays PLC following allegations that the company issued misleading business information. This investigation stems from a Reuters article reporting Barclays' significant exposure to the collapsed UK mortgage provider Market Financial Solutions Ltd, which caused a drop in Barclays' American Depositary Shares. Investors who purchased Barclays securities are encouraged to contact the law firm to learn about joining a prospective class action for potential compensation.

feed.title: Brookfield Business Partners L.P. (NYSE:BBU) Short Interest Up 24.3% in March
feed.summary: Brookfield Business Partners L.P. (NYSE:BBU) experienced a 24.3% increase in short interest during March, reaching 66,186 shares as of March 13th. This represents 0.1% of shares outstanding with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.5. Despite a significant Q4 earnings miss, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $43, and institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: BEAM (NASDAQ: BEAM) insider schedules 25,000-share sale after option exercise
feed.summary: An insider at Beam Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: BEAM) has scheduled the sale of 25,000 shares after exercising stock options, as indicated by a Rule 144 SEC filing. The filing also notes previous sales by John M. Evans on January 29 and January 30, 2026, each involving 25,000 shares for a total of $734,582.50 and $708,947.50 respectively. This transaction is a routine compliance filing related to the resale of securities following an option exercise.

feed.summary: This page provides current trading information for Grupo Aval Acciones Y Valores SA - ADR (AVAL), including its stock price quote, key statistics like previous close, open, and 1-year change, and details for CFD trading. It also highlights recent articles related to shares like NVIDIA, Tesla, Siemens Energy, and BYD. feed.title: Hyperscale Data to acquire 48.5 acres in Michigan for expansion
feed.summary: Hyperscale Data, an AI data center company, announced its subsidiary Alliance Cloud Services will acquire 48.5 acres in southwest Michigan, more than doubling its current acreage to support complex computing infrastructure. The acquisition is part of its long-term strategy to expand its footprint and increase the capacity of its artificial intelligence data center. The City of Dowagiac, where Hyperscale Data currently operates, stated they have not yet received formal expansion plans or information on the location of the new property from the company.

feed.title: Aspire Biopharma's Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company, Partners with Blue Shark Beverages to Expand Southern California Distribution
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma's subsidiary, Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company, has forged a strategic distribution partnership with Blue Shark Beverages to expand its retail presence in Southern California. This collaboration will introduce BUZZ BOMB™, a proprietary sublingual caffeine stick pack, to markets including Palm Springs, Los Angeles, and San Diego, targeting the growing "better-for-you" energy market. The partnership aims to leverage Blue Shark's established network to meet increasing consumer demand for functional, health-conscious fitness supplements.

feed.title: Ascendis Pharma Expands Share Capital Following March 30 Warrant Exercises
feed.summary: Ascendis Pharma (ASND) has increased its nominal share capital by DKK 399,438 to DKK 62,376,846 following the closure of its warrant exercise window on March 30, 2026. This resulted in the issuance of 399,438 new shares at an average cash consideration of approximately $92.10 per share. While modestly diluting existing shareholders, the move strengthens the company's equity base, prompting updates to its articles of association.

feed.title: Ascendis Pharma (NASDAQ: ASND) adds shares after warrant exercises
feed.summary: Ascendis Pharma A/S reported the closing of an exercise window for warrants linked to its ordinary shares, leading to a registered share capital increase of DKK 399,438. The company issued 399,438 new ordinary shares at an average cash consideration of approximately USD $92.10 per share. Consequently, Ascendis Pharma amended its articles of association to reflect the updated total share capital of DKK 62,376,846.

feed.title: Ohio solar campus expands with 30,000-square-foot HQ, test site
feed.summary: ARRAY Technologies announced that its subsidiary, APA Solar, has opened a new 30,000 square foot headquarters on its manufacturing campus in Ridgeville Corners, Ohio. This expansion includes a Foundations Center of Excellence and a 5-acre solar testing site, aimed at strengthening domestic manufacturing and integrated tracker-foundation solutions. The new facility is designed to foster collaboration, shorten development cycles, and reinforce long-term investment in U.S. operations and local jobs for the utility-scale solar market.

feed.title: Assembly Biosciences (ASMB) boosts CEO bonus target in 2026 plan
feed.summary: Assembly Biosciences (ASMB) has adopted a new 2026 Corporate Bonus Plan, effective January 1, 2026, designed to motivate and reward employees with performance-based cash bonuses. The plan outlines varying target bonus opportunities, up to 75% of base salary for the CEO, and distinguishes between corporate and individual objectives. Notably, the Compensation Committee also increased CEO Jason A. Okazaki’s bonus target from 60% to 65% of his base salary for fiscal 2026.

feed.title: iShares Future AI & Tech ETF (ARTY) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides current trading information and key statistics for the iShares Future AI & Tech ETF (ARTY), which tracks the NYSE FactSet Global Robotics and Artificial Intelligence Index. It details CFD trading conditions, including spreads, overnight funding adjustments, and margin requirements. The page also features recent articles related to major tech stocks like Amazon, Siemens, Microsoft, and HENSOLDT, and includes customer testimonials for Capital.com.

feed.title: Auddia to execute 1-for-7.7 reverse stock split; shares down
feed.summary: Auddia (AUUD) announced it will execute a 1-for-7.7 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective at 5:00 p.m. ET on April 1, 2026. The company's shares were down 6.25% in premarket trading following the news. The reverse split aims to increase the per share trading price to regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Reminds Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. Investors with Significant Losses to Contact the Firm Before Upcoming Lead Plaintiff Deadline
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has announced a class action lawsuit against Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. for investors who purchased securities between June 16, 2025, and January 8, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Aquestive gave a false impression about the approval of its New Drug Application for Anaphylm, leading to a significant stock price drop after deficiencies were identified by the FDA. Investors who suffered losses have until May 4, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff in the lawsuit.

feed.title: AGG ETF Climbs 0.5%
feed.summary: The AGG ETF (iShares Core U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF) saw a 0.5% increase in its value. The article does not provide further details or context for this gain.

feed.title: Aprea Therapeutics (Nasdaq: APRE) secures $30M and reports WEE1 trial response
feed.summary: Aprea Therapeutics has secured approximately $30 million in gross proceeds through an oversubscribed private placement, extending its cash runway into Q1 2028. The company also reported positive clinical data from its Phase 1 ACESOT-1051 trial for WEE1 inhibitor APR-1051, showing a confirmed partial response in PPP2R1A-mutated endometrial cancer and generally manageable safety. This financing and promising trial data reinforce Aprea's commitment to developing targeted therapies for biomarker-defined cancers.

feed.title: Abercrombie & Fitch (NYSE: ANF) CEO awarded 290,904 shares as stock grant
feed.summary: Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Fran Horowitz received a grant of 290,904 shares of Class A Common Stock as equity compensation on March 26, 2026. Simultaneously, 128,289 shares were disposed of to cover tax obligations. After these transactions, Horowitz directly owns 517,793 shares, increasing her equity stake in the company.

feed.title: Abercrombie & Fitch (ANF) EVP awarded 70,522 shares; 34,832 withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Abercrombie & Fitch (ANF) EVP Samir Desai was awarded 70,522 shares of Class A Common Stock as compensation. Concurrently, 34,832 shares were withheld at a price of $89.76 per share to cover tax obligations. Following these transactions, Desai directly owns 99,625 shares of Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against Insulet Corporation (PODD) and Encourages Shareholders to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) following a significant drop in its stock price after the company disclosed a voluntary Medical Device Correction for specific lots of its Omnipod® 5 Pods due to a manufacturing issue. The firm is encouraging shareholders who purchased Insulet securities to learn more about the investigation to potentially recover losses. This investigation seeks to determine if there are grounds for a class action on behalf of affected investors stemming from the alleged manufacturing issue and subsequent stock decline.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Transforms Supply Chain via o9 AI Integration
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has partnered with o9 Solutions and Accenture to implement an AI-powered Digital Brain platform across its 70 global sites. This integration aims to enhance supply chain agility, efficiency, and planning capabilities by replacing disconnected tools with a unified enterprise model. The new system leverages AI and machine learning for improved forecasting, better demand-supply matching, and streamlined inventory and deployment decisions, especially critical for Hormel's complex global network.

feed.title: Microsoft Deepens Thailand Partnership with more than US$1 billion Investment, Spanning Technology, Trust, and Talent
feed.summary: Microsoft is investing over US$1 billion in Thailand between 2026 and 2028 to boost its cloud and AI infrastructure, expand its partnership with the Royal Thai Government, and support the country's AI-powered future. This investment, part of the "Advancing National Growth, Prosperity, and Global Competitiveness with AI" initiative, focuses on technology, trust, and talent development. The effort aims to skill millions of Thai citizens, build world-class infrastructure, and establish a secure digital foundation for the nation.

feed.title: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation from analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $246.40. The company recently reported Q4 EPS of $1.76, beating estimates, and set FY2026 EPS guidance at $7.20-$7.28. RSG also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.625, representing an annualized yield of 1.1%.

feed.title: A new onsemi power module lifts solar inverter output to 350 kW
feed.summary: onsemi has secured a design win with Sineng Electric, providing its FS7 IGBT + EliteSiC hybrid power integrated modules (PIMs) for Sineng's 430 kW liquid-cooled energy storage systems and 320 kW utility-scale solar inverters. This integration is expected to boost efficiency by up to 0.1%, increase power density by 32%, and reduce switching losses and thermal resistance. These improvements enable higher system ratings, allowing a solar inverter's output to increase from 320 kW to 350 kW without a larger footprint, ultimately contributing to a more stable and reliable renewable energy grid.

feed.title: Omnicom Group Inc. stock: Institutional confidence builds amid strategic shifts and mixed 2025 resul
feed.summary: Institutional investors, including major firms and the Czech National Bank, have increased their stakes in Omnicom Group Inc. despite a Q4 earnings miss, signaling long-term confidence. The company reported strong annual revenue growth for 2025, topping $17.27 billion, and announced a $5 billion share repurchase program and a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per share to enhance shareholder value. CEO John Wren's significantly increased compensation package, heavily tied to stock options, reflects a commitment to strategic transformation and long-term performance.

feed.title: Nio CEO William Li Sits Down With Qualcomm China Chair: Cars Are the 'Core Engine' Pushing AI Forward — H
feed.summary: Qualcomm China Chairman Frank Meng, in an interview with Nio CEO William Li, highlighted cars as the next major platform driving AI adoption, similar to how smartphones pushed mobile computing. Meng emphasized that automotive users' intolerance for interruptions is setting the pace for AI development. Despite concerns about a looming memory crunch affecting AI infrastructure, Nio is strategically positioning its ET9 flagship as a "mobile living environment" with advanced AI features, coinciding with significant improvements in the company's Q4 financial results.

feed.title: Does FIS's New Prediction Markets Platform and CTO Exit Reframe Its Long-Term Innovation Story?
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) recently announced the resignation of its Chief Product Technology Officer and simultaneously launched a new cloud-native CD Prediction Clearing platform for regulated prediction markets. This article examines how the new platform could impact FIS's long-term investment narrative and competitive position, particularly concerning its push into real-time processing and its ability to integrate complex solutions amidst existing margin and competitive pressures. The company's future growth and analyst expectations for its AI and data-driven products will be influenced by the success of this platform and its ability to maintain a strong position against fintechs and banks building in-house solutions.

feed.title: Pendle joins Vietnam IFC delegation alongside BlackRock, Morgan Stanley, and Deutsche Bank By Chainwire
feed.summary: Pendle's CEO TN Lee represented the DeFi protocol at a high-level financial delegation in New York, meeting with Vietnam’s Deputy Prime Minister to discuss the investment case for Vietnam’s International Financial Center. Pendle's participation alongside major traditional financial institutions like BlackRock, Morgan Stanley, and Deutsche Bank signals a significant step towards institutional adoption of DeFi, especially concerning Real World Assets (RWAs) and yield tokenization. The collaboration aims to position Southeast Asia as a destination for global institutional capital and integrate DeFi infrastructure into sovereign financial policy discussions.

feed.title: Antalpha Platform Holding (ANTA) price target decreased by 29.90% to 11.56
feed.summary: This article reports a significant decrease in the price target for Antalpha Platform Holding (ANTA). The target has been lowered by 29.90% to 11.56.

feed.title: Fidelity Bank to Acquire Affinity Bank in $142.8M Deal
feed.summary: Fidelity BancShares (N.C.), Inc. has announced a definitive merger agreement to acquire Affinity Bancshares, Inc. in an all-cash transaction valued at approximately $142.8 million. This acquisition will expand Fidelity's footprint into the Georgia market, creating a combined entity with $5.5 billion in total assets. The transaction is expected to close in the third quarter of 2026, pending regulatory and stockholder approvals.

feed.title: Fidelity Bancshares and its subsidiary Fidelity Bank have officially announced that they have reached a definitive merger agreement regarding the acquisition of Affinity Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiary Affinity Bank.
feed.summary: Fidelity Bancshares and its subsidiary Fidelity Bank have reached a definitive merger agreement to acquire Affinity Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiary Affinity Bank. This transaction signifies a crucial step in the strategic integration of the two financial institutions.

feed.title: Annexon (NASDAQ:ANNX) Releases Earnings Results, Hits Expectations
feed.summary: Annexon (NASDAQ:ANNX) announced earnings per share of ($0.32), meeting analyst expectations. The stock saw a slight dip to $4.96. Insider transactions were mixed with a director purchasing shares and an EVP selling, while hedge funds increased their holdings.

feed.title: Agnico Eagle (NYSE: AEM) to take Cascadia stake and fund Yukon exploration
feed.summary: Agnico Eagle Mines Limited plans to acquire a significant stake in Cascadia Minerals through a non-brokered private placement and additional unit purchases, totaling 29,315,300 common shares and 14,657,650 warrants, representing approximately 14.21% ownership on a non-diluted basis. Alongside this investment, Agnico Eagle will enter into an earn-in agreement for Cascadia's Catch property in Yukon and a strategic alliance to fund generative exploration in the Stikine Terrane, with Cascadia acting as operator. This allows Agnico Eagle to gain strategic Yukon exposure and potential majority interests in future projects.

feed.title: ADMA Biologics, Inc. (ADMA) Crashes 16% Amid Scrutiny Over Skyrocketing Days Sales Outstanding That Short Seller Claims Points to Improper Channel Stuffing, Hagens Berman Investigating
feed.summary: ADMA Biologics, Inc. (ADMA) shares crashed over 16% after short seller Culper Research accused the company of channel stuffing, using undisclosed related party distributors, and inflating reported growth by extending payment terms to distributors. Hagens Berman, a national shareholders rights firm, is investigating whether ADMA violated federal securities laws, focusing on the company's financial statements and internal control over financial reporting. The investigation emphasizes ADMA's skyrocketing Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) and alleged misrepresentation of revenue growth.

feed.title: [8-K] AEON Biopharma, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: AEON Biopharma, Inc. announced its financial results for the full year 2025, reporting a net loss of $39,222 thousand compared to a net income of $42,005 thousand in 2024. Despite the loss and a highly leveraged capital structure, the company advanced its ABP-450 biosimilar program with positive analytical data and favorable FDA feedback, and strengthened its balance sheet through a $6 million PIPE financing and debt reduction. The company expects to complete most analytical comparability work in 2026.

feed.title: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE:ACA) Short Interest Up 25.6% in March
feed.summary: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE:ACA) saw a significant increase in short interest in March, rising 25.6% to 1,135,262 shares. Despite a slight revenue miss, the company beat EPS estimates for the quarter, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $120. Institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the company's shares.

feed.title: Alset Inc. (NASDAQ: AEI) extends $2.45M 3% convertible loan and warrants to DSS
feed.summary: Alset Inc., through its majority-owned subsidiary Alset International Limited, has finalized a material financing arrangement with related-party company DSS, Inc. This agreement involves a $2.45 million 3% convertible promissory note and warrants to purchase 16,554,055 DSS shares. The transaction, approved by Alset's Board and Audit Committee, with recusal of overlapping directors, is contingent on DSS stockholder approval and aims to provide both interest income and potential equity upside for Alset.

feed.title: Did Homes.com Traffic Moderation and New Disclosures Just Shift CoStar Group's (CSGP) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: CoStar Group's investment narrative is being re-evaluated due to moderated traffic on Homes.com and increased transparency in reporting. While the launch of Homes AI aims to boost engagement, Goldman Sachs's analyst George Tong noted softer Homes.com engagement compared to Apartments.com. Investors are now focusing on how these factors and product-level data will impact CoStar's residential strategy and overall business confidence.

feed.title: Goldman Still Sees Gold at $5,400 By Year-End Despite Downturn
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs maintains its bullish outlook on gold, projecting the precious metal will reach $5,400 per ounce by the end of 2026, despite a recent 13% decline since the Iran war began. Analysts cite ongoing central bank purchases and anticipated US interest rate cuts as key factors supporting this forecast.

feed.title: Ameriprise reports 3.95M voting rights, topping 5% in Diversified Energy
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial has disclosed a 5.056% stake in Diversified Energy Company, equating to 3,945,895 voting rights. This threshold was crossed on February 4, 2026, with the issuer notified on March 30, 2026, and all holdings are indirect via Ameriprise affiliates. The announcement follows recent corporate actions by Diversified Energy, including share repurchases and dividend declarations.

feed.title: REITs Are the S&P 500’s Highest Yielding Sector. Realty Income and 3 More to Buy Now.
feed.summary: Real estate investment trusts (REITs) offer some of the highest dividend yields in the current stock market, making them attractive for income-focused investors. This article highlights several REITs, including Realty Income, as top picks for purchase. The focus is on the strong dividend potential within the real estate sector.

feed.title: Barclays crosses 5% threshold in Diversified Energy filing
feed.summary: Barclays PLC has reported crossing a 5.20% voting rights threshold in Diversified Energy (NYSE:DEC) on March 24, 2026, according to a TR-1 major holdings notification. This stake is held through a combination of direct/indirect shares (3.41%) and various financial instruments (1.79%), including a significant reliance on derivatives. The filing also notes that the trading book exemption for Barclays no longer applies, signifying a reclassification of these holdings.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corp Stock: A Leader in Refining Amid Energy Transition Challenges and Opportunities
feed.summary: This article analyzes Valero Energy Corp, a prominent independent petroleum refiner, examining its operational scale, financial health, and strategic adaptations in a volatile energy market. It highlights Valero's focus on downstream refining, its venture into renewable diesel, and its disciplined approach to shareholder returns, all while navigating sector dynamics and energy transition challenges. The piece offers North American investors insights into Valero's potential for long-term value, considering both risks and growth catalysts.

feed.title: Aehr Test Systems (AEHR) Projected to Post Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems (AEHR) is projected to announce its Q3 2026 earnings on Tuesday, April 7th, with analysts expecting ($0.07) EPS and $10.846 million in revenue. The company previously exceeded EPS estimates but missed on revenue in its last quarter. Shares of AEHR were trading down approximately 7.4% at $30.11, with a market capitalization of $922.27 million and an average analyst rating of "Hold" with a $21 price target.

feed.title: Alaska Air names Microsoft executive to C-suite role
feed.summary: Alaska Airlines has appointed Lindsay-Rae McIntyre, formerly a Microsoft executive, as its new Head of Human Resources. She will replace Andy Schneider, who was recently promoted to CEO of Horizon Air, an Alaska subsidiary.

feed.title: Is Western Digital Stock’s 21% Drop A Bargain?
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) stock has recently dropped by 20.6% in less than a month. The article explores whether this dip presents a buying opportunity, noting that historically, WDC has shown a median return of 26% and a peak return of 51% in the 12 months following similar sharp dips. It also highlights that WDC passes basic financial quality checks, including revenue growth, profitability, cash flow, and balance sheet strength.

feed.title: Truist Financial Initiates American Tower Corporation (AMT) with Buy, Sees Long-Term Upside
feed.summary: Truist Financial initiated coverage of American Tower Corporation (AMT) with a Buy rating and a $205 price target, citing long-term upside in the towers business despite near-term challenges like slower organic growth and interest rate pressures. During their Q4 2025 earnings call, AMT's CFO Rodney Smith outlined projected 2026 organic tenant billings growth, anticipating around 1% consolidated growth, with stronger performance expected in Africa and APAC regions. The article also suggests that while AMT is a potential investment, there might be AI stocks with greater upside and less downside risk.

The page also includes related news articles about AI and tech stocks like NVIDIA, Tesla, Siemens Energy, and BYD.

feed.title: Avalon Globocare (NASDAQ: ALBT) wins approval for reverse split and share issuances
feed.summary: Avalon Globocare stockholders have approved several proposals, including the issuance of shares related to convertible notes and a bridge note. They also approved the exchange of Series D Preferred Stock for common shares and the issuance of restricted shares under a consulting agreement. Crucially, the board gained authority to implement a reverse stock split at a ratio between 1-for-2 and 1-for-25 without reducing authorized shares.

feed.title: Aktis Oncology Announces FDA Clearance of Investigational New Drug Applications for AKY-2519 and Provides Business Updates and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Aktis Oncology announced that the FDA cleared Investigational New Drug (IND) applications for AKY-2519, a miniprotein radioconjugate targeting B7-H3, enabling a Phase 1b clinical trial to begin in mid-2026. The company also provided business updates, including the Fast Track designation for its lead candidate AKY-1189, and reported financial results for 2025, showing increased R&D expenses and a net loss of $63.7 million. With a pro forma cash position of $562.1 million after its January 2026 IPO, Aktis anticipates funding operations into 2029.

feed.title: Trade Global X Alternative Income ETF - ALTY CFD
feed.summary: This article provides details for trading the Global X Alternative Income ETF (ALTY) as a CFD on Capital.com Australia. It outlines trading conditions such as spreads, overnight funding adjustments, margin, and commissions. The piece also includes key statistics for ALTY and links to related articles on other company stocks.

feed.title: Allient (ALNT) VP trims stake with 6,000-share, $63 stock sale
feed.summary: Allient Inc.'s VP and Group President, Ashish Bendre, sold 6,000 shares of the company's common stock in an open-market transaction at $63.00 per share, totaling $378,000. Following this sale, Bendre directly holds 20,197.975 shares and indirectly holds an additional 1,155 shares through an ESOP Trust. The transaction is categorized as a high-impact filing with a negative sentiment, signaling a reduction in insider ownership.
